overview: MAW Platform — a full-stack mobile accessories e-commerce marketplace with six portals: customer storefront, admin, manager, delivery, collaboration, and support.
features: Amazon-style customer portal with product browsing, cart, checkout, and order tracking
Dynamic product sorting by company, brand, type, price, and rating
INR currency throughout the entire platform
Geolocation address auto-fill on checkout using browser location
Floating customer support chat bubble and dedicated support page
Vendor registration with mobile accessories categories and admin approval queue
Admin product management — add, edit, and delete products
Admin vendor requests portal with approve/reject workflow
Internet Identity login gate before adding to cart
Manager complaints dashboard with resolve actions
Delivery, collaboration, and support portal stubs
